questions.title: How do I book a ride on FeyRide?
questions.content: Simply search for your destination, select a route that matches your schedule, book seats, and pay through the app. You'll receive a unique PIN to check in with your rider.

questions.title: Is my payment secure?
questions.content: Yes! FeyRide uses bank-level encryption. All payments are processed through secure gateways. Your wallet is protected, and funds are held until you complete your trip.

questions.title: What if I need to cancel?
questions.content: You can cancel up to 2 hours before your ride for a full refund. Cancellations within 2 hours may incur a NGN 100 convenience fee.

questions.title: What if my rider cancels?
questions.content: You'll get an instant refund and see alternative routes. We also credit NGN 50 to your wallet as an apology for the inconvenience.

questions.title: What do I need to become a rider?
questions.content: Complete KYC verification, submit valid driver's license and vehicle photos. You must have a reliable vehicle and a good track record of no accidents.

questions.title: How much can I earn?
questions.content: Earnings depend on your route popularity and commission tier. First-time riders earn 20% commission. As you complete more trips, commission reduces to 15% (20-40 trips) or 10% (40+ trips).

questions.title: Can I decline bookings?
questions.content: Yes! You have full control. You can accept or decline before passengers board. We suggest declining less than 5% of bookings to maintain good standing.

questions.title: What if a passenger doesn't show up?
questions.content: If a passenger hasn't checked in 15 minutes after scheduled time, you can mark them as no-show. No charges apply to you, and the passenger loses their booking fee.

questions.title: How does FeyRide ensure safety?
questions.content: All users undergo multi-step verification: ID + selfie match + phone verification. Drivers provide vehicle photos. Real-time trip monitoring, SOS button, and 24/7 support are available.

questions.title: Can I see who I'm riding with before booking?
questions.content: After you confirm your booking, you'll see the rider's name, photo, vehicle details, and rating. This builds trust while protecting privacy initially.

questions.title: What if I feel unsafe?
questions.content: Press the SOS button in the app - it alerts nearby authorities and FeyRide support. You can also exit the vehicle anytime. Report via chat, and our team investigates within 24 hours.

questions.title: Are rides monitored in real-time?
questions.content: Yes! All rides are GPS-tracked. If you deviate significantly from the posted route, both passengers and FeyRide support get an alert.

questions.title: What payment methods do you accept?
questions.content: FeyRide accepts bank transfers, debit cards, and credit cards. We don't accept cash. All payments must be through the app to maintain safety and records.

questions.title: When do riders get paid?
questions.content: Riders are credited to their wallet instantly after each passenger completes their trip. You can withdraw to your bank account anytime with no hidden fees.

questions.title: Are there hidden charges?
questions.content: No hidden charges! The price you see is the price you pay. Riders see their commission tier upfront, and passengers see the final cost before payment.

questions.title: Can I use the free ride credit?
questions.content: New passengers get a one-time free ride credit (up to NGN 2,000). Apply it at checkout for your first ride. It's non-transferable and expires after 30 days.
